description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ownCloud CI that runs on every pull request and push to the master and 2.7 branches. Use a matrix job that builds ownCloud on multiple platforms including Windows, macOS, and Linux with various Python and compiler configurations. For each job, check out the source code, clone CraftMaster, craft unshelve, prepare, install dependencies, build, run tests, package, update shelf, and upload artifacts.
